author: Reece
name: SunoCog
short: Play public Suno songs through Red Audio.
description: Resolves public Suno song links and queues the extracted MP3 into Red's core Audio cog.
install_msg: After loading both `audio` and `sunocog`, you can use `[p]play <share_url>` for Suno links or `[p]suno <share_url>` as a fallback.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store personal data. It only fetches publicly accessible Suno song metadata at command time.
